name: Spec Update

tasks.title: Update Non-Daemon Mode section in log-command-design spec
tasks.description: Update Non-Daemon Mode section in log-command-design spec
tasks.body:
The existing log-command-design spec (2026-03-21T18-00Z) has a Non-Daemon Mode section (lines 129-133) that says non-daemon output 'should match the interleaved format.' This contradicts the new requirement: foreground mode should default to summary and accept the same flags as wolfcastle log. Update that section to:
1. State that the default renderer is summary (one line per completed stage).
2. Document that --thoughts, --interleaved, and --json flags are accepted with the same last-wins semantics as wolfcastle log.
3. Keep the architectural point that rendering is done by a goroutine tailing the NDJSON log file, sharing renderers with wolfcastle log.
4. Remove or correct any statement that says interleaved is the default for non-daemon mode.
acceptance_criteria: Non-Daemon Mode section says foreground defaults to summary
Section documents that foreground mode accepts --thoughts
--json flags with same semantics as wolfcastle log
No contradictions remain between Non-Daemon Mode section and the new behavior

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Spec Update is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify the Non-Daemon Mode section no longer says interleaved is the default
Verify the spec documents --thoughts, --interleaved, --json flag acceptance in foreground mode

breadcrumbs.text: Updated Non-Daemon Mode section in log-command-design spec: changed default renderer from interleaved to summary, documented --thoughts/--interleaved/--json flag support with last-wins semantics, preserved goroutine-tailing architecture point

task-0001.objective: Update the Non-Daemon Mode section of the log-command-design spec to reflect that foreground mode defaults to summary, not interleaved
task-0001.what_happened: Rewrote lines 129-133 of 2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md. Replaced the single paragraph claiming interleaved was the default with three paragraphs: (1) summary as default renderer, (2) flag support with last-wins semantics, (3) goroutine-tailing architecture preserved. Verified no other mentions of interleaved-as-default remain in the spec.
went_well: Clean edit with no ripple effects elsewhere in the document
action_items: Implementation tasks for the foreground renderer flags should reference this updated spec section for behavioral requirements
